## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a script that was crashing or producing wrong output)
- [ ] New script (adds a concept to the learning path)
- [ ] Improvement (clearer comments, better explanation, minor fix)
- [ ] README / docs update

## Checklist

- [ ] Script has the standard file header (Concept, What it does, What you'll learn, Run)
- [ ] Script runs end-to-end without errors
- [ ] README table updated (if adding a new script)
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
